title: helianthemum violaceum subsp. subobtusatum
intro: Helianthemum violaceum subsp. subobtusatum, also known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species within the family Cistaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum violaceum subsp. subobtusatum include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of rockrose often involve infusions or tinctures made from the plant's leaves, flowers, and stems.
